allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''peptides_clean_slim.json''\)\); print\(''JSON 구조:'', type\(d\), ''키:'', list\(d.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(d, dict\) else f''배열 길이: {len\(d\)}''\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''peptides_clean_slim.json'', encoding=''utf-8''\)\); print\(''타입:'', type\(d\)\); print\(''키:'', list\(d.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(d, dict\) else f''배열 길이: {len\(d\)}''\); first = list\(d.values\(\)\)[0] if isinstance\(d, dict\) else d[0]; print\(''첫번째 항목 키:'', list\(first.keys\(\)\)\)")
